questions.question: Who directed the movie 'Inception'?
questions.explanation: Christopher Nolan wrote and directed 'Inception' in 2010.

questions.question: Which band released the album 'Abbey Road'?
questions.explanation: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969, their final recorded album.

questions.question: Who played Jack Dawson in 'Titanic'?
questions.explanation: Leonardo DiCaprio starred as Jack Dawson in the 1997 film 'Titanic'.

questions.question: What is the highest-grossing film of all time?
questions.explanation: Avatar (2009) has grossed over $2.9 billion worldwide.

questions.question: Which TV show features the character Walter White?
questions.explanation: Walter White is the main character in 'Breaking Bad', played by Bryan Cranston.

questions.question: Who sang 'Bohemian Rhapsody'?
questions.explanation: Queen released 'Bohemian Rhapsody' in 1975, written by Freddie Mercury.

questions.question: Which actor won the Oscar for Best Actor in 'The Revenant'?
questions.explanation: Leonardo DiCaprio won his first Oscar for 'The Revenant' in 2016.

questions.question: What is the name of the coffee shop in 'Friends'?
questions.explanation: Central Perk was the coffee shop where the Friends characters often met.

questions.question: Which rapper's real name is Marshall Mathers?
questions.explanation: Eminem's real name is Marshall Bruce Mathers III.

questions.question: What year did 'The Simpsons' first air?
questions.explanation: 'The Simpsons' premiered on December 17, 1989, on Fox.
